title: TileLayer
description: A generic, format-independent tile layer with chunk-first storage. Tile data is stored in fixed-size TileChunks indexed by signed chunk coordinates. For finite maps, only chunks that intersect the layer bounds exist. **Mutation must go through the layer's public APIs only.** `setTileAt` / `clearTileAt` validate coordinates, tileset references, and increment revision counters only when the stored value actually changes. Direct chunk mutation is not supported — the layer owns chunk storage and exposes only a ReadonlyTileChunk view. The layer is NOT a SceneNode — that integration lives in import('./TileLayerNode').TileLayerNode.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: A generic, format-independent tile layer with chunk-first storage.
Tile data is stored in fixed-size TileChunks indexed by signed chunk coordinates. For finite maps, only chunks that intersect the layer bounds exist.

**Mutation must go through the layer's public APIs only.** `setTileAt` / `clearTileAt` validate coordinates, tileset references, and increment revision counters only when the stored value actually changes. Direct chunk mutation is not supported — the layer owns chunk storage and exposes only a ReadonlyTileChunk view.
The layer is NOT a SceneNode — that integration lives in import('./TileLayerNode').TileLayerNode.

members.name: chunkRange
members.description: Compute the range of chunk coordinates that intersect this layer.

members.name: clearRect
members.signature: clearRect(x: number, y: number, w: number, h: number): void
members.description: Clear a rectangular region.

members.name: clearTileAt
members.description: Clear (erase) the tile at the given coordinates. No-op if the cell is already empty.

members.name: countNonEmptyTiles
members.description: Total number of non-empty tiles across all chunks. Walk is cheap for dense layers; sparse layers benefit from empty-chunk fast path.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Destroy this layer: clear chunk storage and mark destroyed. Does NOT destroy tileset textures or external resources. Idempotent.

members.name: fillRect
members.signature: fillRect(x: number, y: number, w: number, h: number, tile: ResolvedTile): void
members.description: Fill a rectangular region with a tile.

members.name: getChunk
members.signature: getChunk(cx: number, cy: number): ReadonlyTileChunk | undefined
members.description: Get a readonly view of a chunk by signed chunk coordinates, or undefined if it does not exist (never been touched).

members.name: getRawTileAt
members.description: Get the raw packed tile word at (tx, ty). Returns 0 for empty or out-of-bounds.

members.name: getTileAt
members.signature: getTileAt(tx: number, ty: number): ResolvedTile | null
members.description: Query a resolved tile at (tx, ty). Returns null for empty or out-of-bounds.

members.name: inBounds
members.description: Check whether a tile coordinate lies within the layer bounds.

members.name: loadedChunks
members.description: Iterate over all loaded chunks in deterministic (cy, cx) ascending order. Returns readonly chunk views — callers cannot mutate storage.

members.name: pixelToTile
members.description: Convert a local pixel position to the tile coordinate that contains it. Uses floor, so a point exactly on a tile boundary maps to the tile. May return coordinates outside layer bounds.

members.name: setTileAt
members.signature: setTileAt(tx: number, ty: number, tile: ResolvedTile): void
members.description: Set a tile at the given tile coordinates. No-op if the effective value is unchanged.

members.name: tilesInRect
members.signature: tilesInRect(x: number, y: number, w: number, h: number): Generator<object>
members.description: Iterate non-empty tiles within a rectangular region in row-major order. Yields (tx, ty, resolvedTile) tuples. Skips empty cells.

members.name: tileToPixel
members.description: Convert a tile coordinate to the pixel position of its top-left corner in the layer's local space.

members.name: chunkHeight
members.description: Chunk height (tiles).

members.name: chunkWidth
members.description: Chunk width (tiles).

members.name: class
members.description: Layer class/type string (Tiled class; may be empty).

members.name: height
members.description: Height in tiles.

members.name: id
members.description: Stable unique ID within the map.

members.name: name
members.description: Display name (may not be unique).

members.name: offsetX
members.description: Horizontal pixel offset (mutable).

members.name: offsetY
members.description: Vertical pixel offset (mutable).

members.name: opacity
members.description: Opacity 0..1 (mutable).

members.name: parallaxX
members.description: Parallax scroll factor on the X axis. 1.0 = full camera speed, 0.5 = half speed, 0.0 = stationary.

members.name: parallaxY
members.description: Parallax scroll factor on the Y axis. 1.0 = full camera speed, 0.5 = half speed, 0.0 = stationary.

members.name: properties
members.description: Immutable layer properties.

members.name: tileHeight
members.description: Tile height in pixels.

members.name: tilesets
members.description: The tilesets available to this layer (shared array reference).

members.name: tileWidth
members.description: Tile width in pixels.

members.name: tintColor
members.description: Multiplicative layer tint as 0xRRGGBB, or null for no tint.

members.name: visible
members.description: Visibility flag (mutable).

members.name: width
members.description: Width in tiles.

members.name: destroyed
members.description: Whether the layer has been destroyed.

members.name: pixelHeight
members.description: Pixel height.

members.name: pixelWidth
members.description: Pixel width.

members.name: revision
members.description: Monotonic layer revision counter. Increments on every cell mutation that changes a stored value. No-op writes and failed mutations do NOT increment.
